notes: Excellent performance across all criteria. The glossary identifies 37 acronyms (exceeds the ~25-30 expectation), with all expansions verified as accurate, including domain-specific terms like CSEA, ISART, and TSB 10-F. Context descriptions are substantive and meeting-specific rather than generic restatements. Alphabetical sorting, clear categorization (6 categories), and consistent table formatting are flawless. Minor deduction: agent created two identical output files (acronym_glossary.md and acronym_glossary_1.md) when only one was requested, representing unnecessary tool usage and verbosity. Core deliverable quality is genuinely excellent.
